calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:38 am
Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider, clerk - K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Judge Pro Tem disclose he used to work for Insurance Company, it might cause conflict. After discussion, both party no objections to have matter heard by Judge Pro Tem. Appellant, Farmer Insurance Company present by attorney Hunter W. Sims,III (#266039). Respondent Filip Kharon present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider.

EXRA: Agreement Confirmation and record of policy collectively marked


9:49 am
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-14-2011 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Continued To Oct-13-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
